meaning: n.[鸟]嘲鸟(善鸣叫,并能模仿别种鸟的叫声,故名)
examples: Have you ever read To Kill a Mockingbird?
In To Kill a Mockingbird, Harper Lee based Dill on her childhood friend, Truman Capote.
To Kill a Mockingbird is not just the kind of book people hold in their hearts;
And as Scout from Mockingbird can tell you, these decadent layer cakes pack an alcoholic punch.
If a subject runs from 1313 Mockingbird Lane to 1315 Mockingbird Lane, does the drone need to go blind?
